nasb.text: So we built the wall and the whole wall was joined together to half its height, for the people had a mind to work.

esv.text: So we built the wall. And all the wall was joined together to half its height, for the people had a mind to work.

cnv.text: 這樣，我們重建城牆，把全部城牆連接起來，城牆達到一半的高度，因為眾人都全心作工。

ccb.text: 众人全心做工，把整个城墙连接起来，高达原来的一半。
